message:
Merge polecat/rictus/gt-utuk: replace ps string matching with structural identity checks

ZFC fix: replaces fragile ps/pgrep string matching in daemon and dolt server
with structural checks — flock-based orphan detection, TCP port connectivity,
and state-file-based data-dir lookup.

Fixes: gt-utuk
